author: DominicVainMod
content:
@everyone

Opal Rayfam Releasing Tomorrow

You may not know the Opal Rayfam, but the Opal Rayfam knows you.  

The second Data Runner ship to join the roster will release .

Alongside the immediate utility of free scanning in SAGE Labs, there will be a short promotional period that you can look forward to learning more about tomorrow.

 | Only on https://play.staratlas.com/
